title: Louis Bugs Gruntilda (Soccer Round 6 with Axelrod)
description:
Damnit this took forever to make.

I wanted to keep the song choice as a secret from Axelrod but I did a horrible job at it. He even knew what it was before I even started it. I said something along the lines of "the song I had in mind is 3 minutes long" and he was like "oh... I think it's Banjo Kazooie Final Battle" yada yada he was right.

Anyway, I wanted to end this thing with a bang. I think I did an okay job at that. Thanks for the fun match, Axelrod. I may play this with someone else sometime.

Credits to TheShadowOfDeathClan for the PILLZ clip.
